project.name: 管理后台重设计
project.designRead: admin console / internal operators / warm editorial premium / high density / avoid cold corporate grid

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Warm parchment background #fbfaf9, dark cocoa foreground #3b352b, Fraunces serif font, 2rem radius, nearly invisible shadows (opacity 0), border-driven hierarchy #e1dccf, warm secondary #9b965f, muted accent #cbc0aa

iconAssets.coloringRule: currentColor by default; override with Library token when needed

pages.title: 仪表盘
pages.businessScenario: Admin dashboard overview with KPI stats, recent activity, quick actions, and resource summary charts
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial command center that feels like a premium operations briefing — spacious KPI cards in Fraunces serif, calm parchment surfaces, with chart panels that tell a concise data story
pages.compositionPattern: Hero summary band with KPI card row + chart panel pair + recent activity feed

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: warm cocoa primary #3b352b, parchment canvas #fbfaf9, golden secondary #9b965f, muted accent #cbc0aa
continuityAnchors.shapeSystem: 2rem radius on all cards and buttons, soft borders at #e1dccf
continuityAnchors.typographySystem: Fraunces serif for all text, 0.01em tracking, generous spacing
continuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 0.3rem base spacing unit, generous internal padding on all containers
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: warm neutral card surfaces, soft hover transitions, editorial tag pills
continuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: nearly invisible shadows (opacity 0), borders and surface tone define hierarchy
continuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: css-mask icons from library, warm-toned imagery
continuityAnchors.interactionTone: restrained hover transitions (-1px translate), subtle background shifts

pages.soulElement: KPI stat cards with warm golden accent numbers and 'last synced 3m ago' microcopy that implies real-time data freshness

pages.title: 添加资源
pages.businessScenario: Resource CRUD table with toolbar, add/edit form dialog, bulk operations, column visibility toggle, and inline actions
pages.visualNorthStar: A refined editorial data table that feels like browsing a curated catalog — warm card-framed table with quiet borders, generous row spacing, and a calm toolbar above
pages.compositionPattern: Toolbar row + data table with warm-toned row hover + floating action button on mobile

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: warm cocoa primary #3b352b, parchment canvas #fbfaf9, golden secondary #9b965f, muted accent #cbc0aa

continuityAnchors.interactionTone: restrained hover transitions (-1px translate), subtle background shifts

pages.soulElement: Table rows with editorial tag pills showing resource categories, and a 'last edited' column with relative timestamps that make the table feel alive

pages.title: 资源列表
pages.businessScenario: Resource browsing view with card/grid toggle, search bar, filter sidebar, and pagination
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial resource gallery that feels like browsing a premium library collection — spacious card grid with Fraunces serif titles, warm thumbnail imagery, and quiet filter controls
pages.compositionPattern: Filter topbar + search + card grid with editorial resource cards + pagination

pages.soulElement: Resource cards with warm-toned cover images and editorial category tag pills, revealing description and source links on hover

pages.title: 分类管理
pages.businessScenario: Interactive tree table for category management with drag-and-drop reordering, inline edit, add/delete, and nested hierarchy
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial tree management surface that feels like organizing a curated collection — clean tree table with generous row spacing, warm accent on expand/collapse, and calm inline editing
pages.compositionPattern: Toolbar + tree table with expandable rows + inline action buttons + category banner illustration

pages.soulElement: Tree table rows with warm folder icons and golden accent on expand chevrons, showing resource count badges that feel like collection inventory

pages.title: 推荐列表
pages.businessScenario: Recommended resources ranked list with editorial cards, recommendation score, and management controls
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial recommendation gallery that feels like a curated reading list — spacious cards with warm cover imagery, recommendation badges, and gentle reorder controls
pages.compositionPattern: Filter bar + ranked card list with drag handles + recommendation score badges

pages.title: 热门列表
pages.businessScenario: Hot resources ranked by engagement metrics with view counts, like counts, and trend indicators
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial hotlist that feels like a weekly briefing of what is trending — clean ranked rows with warm engagement metrics, trend arrows, and quiet stat columns
pages.compositionPattern: Summary band + ranked table with engagement metrics + trend sparkline column

pages.title: 最新列表
pages.businessScenario: Latest resources timeline list with chronological ordering, time stamps, and quick-add-to-list controls
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial timeline of freshly added resources that feels like reading a morning digest — clean chronological cards with relative timestamps, calm separators, and gentle new-item highlights
pages.compositionPattern: Timeline header + chronological card list with time separators + quick action buttons

pages.title: 置顶列表
pages.businessScenario: Pinned/top resources management list with drag-to-reorder, pin toggle, and priority indicators
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial pinned resources board that feels like a curated showcase wall — spacious pinned cards with warm star accents, drag handles, and quiet priority badges
pages.compositionPattern: Summary band + pinned card grid with drag handles + pin toggle controls

assets.semanticDescription: Warm editorial hero banner for admin dashboard overview
